commands: SQL="CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS '$DB_NAME'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '$DB_PASS'; ALTER USER '$DB_NAME'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '$DB_PASS'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON `$DB_NAME`.* TO '$DB_NAME'@'%'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench use frontend"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend clear-cache || true"
docker exec frappe_docker-db-1 sh -lc "mariadb -uroot -padmin -e \"SHOW GRANTS FOR '$DB_NAME'@'%';\""
